title: meniocus serpyllifolius
intro: Meniocus serpyllifolius, also known as Thymus serpyllum, is a low-growing, spreading perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). The plant is native to Europe and Western Asia and is known for its small, pink or white flowers and its medicinal properties. Traditionally, Meniocus serpyllifolius has been used to treat a variety of ailments due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, offering health benefits such as soothing digestive issues, reducing stress and anxiety, and promoting respiratory health. Meniocus serpyllifolius can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
